top_signals.title: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman
top_signals.summary: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump pledges more Iran strikes, saying U.S. will be 'attacking them very hard'
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump promised more attacks on Iran after strikes resumed this week. Earlier this week, he said a deal to end the war was near.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Fall as US-Iran Tension Spurs Rally in Oil: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A flare-up in geopolitical tensions spurred a rally in oil and drove stocks lower, with Wall Street also rattled by a renewed selloff in some the world’s largest technology companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Congress has backed Iran war powers resolutions. Now what? - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Congress has backed Iran war powers resolutions. Now what?  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement actions with former employee of Atlantic Union Bank and former employee of Frost Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement actions with former employee of Atlantic Union Bank and former employee of Frost Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests public comment on a proposal to establish a "payment account," which legally eligible financial institutions could use for the specific purpose of clearing and settling their payments
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests public comment on a proposal to establish a "payment account," which legally eligible financial institutions could use for the specific purpose of clearing and settling their payments
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Frank Elderson: Strengthening operational resilience for the age of AI
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: World Cup travel boost hasn't materialized for U.S. businesses — yet
top_signals.summary: The expected travel boom from the World Cup is looking like it will be a city-by-city, match-by-match test of pricing power.

top_signals.title: Mining M&A value surges in Q1, but deal count plunges: S&P
top_signals.summary: At $26.28 billion, the total value of deals represents the second highest ever for a quarter since the firm began tracking the data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
